APPEAL RECORD CERTIFIED TO THE COURT OF APPEAL , A132251 #1, 1VOL CT & 1 VOL RT (APPEAL FILED 5/25/11)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HOUDINI'S MAGIC SHOP, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 BECAUSE THE COMPLAINT SHOWS DEFENDANT MAINTAINS A FIXED AND PERMANENT LOCATION IN CALIFORNIA. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 12 BECAUSE THERE WAS NO RESTRAINT; SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD FACTS SHOWING OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT. THE PLAINTIFF HAS CHOSEN NOT TO AMEND AND TO FILE ANSWER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. MR. FARBSTEIN TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALLEN WAGNER, TEL. NO. (510) 527-7116 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL FARBSTEIN OF THE LAW FIRM OF FARBSTEIN & BLACKMAN, TEL. NO. (650) 554-6200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HOUDINI'S MAGIC SHOP, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 6 BECAUSE THE COMPLAINT SHOWS DEFENDANT MAINTAINS A FIXED AND PERMANENT LOCATION IN CALIFORNIA. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 12 BECAUSE THERE WAS NO RESTRAINT; SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD FACTS SHOWING OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT. THE PLAINTIFF HAS CHOSEN NOT TO AMEND AND TO FILE ANSWER WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. MR. FARBSTEIN TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)
